title: The better AI gets, the smaller its share of the economy might get – Alex Imas and Phil Trammell
summary: Alex Imas and Phil Trammell explore the economics of AGI, examining how wealth generated by AI development might be distributed across capital and labor. They discuss optimal taxation and redistribution mechanisms, whether capital share grows with AI capability, and how countries outside the AI supply chain can participate in gains.
